when_to_use: Autonomous AWS Reserved Instance purchasing and management
Real-time Savings Plan optimization without manual analysis
Commitment management that adjusts as workloads change
Reducing AWS bills by 30-50% with automated RI strategies
FinOps automation for DevOps teams without cloud finance expertise

pros: AWS RI and Savings Plan automation, hands off
cons: Savings share model can be costly at scale
Niche overlap with Antimetal and ProsperOps
review.verdict: Competent AWS commitment autopilot, largely interchangeable with Antimetal and ProsperOps on core value.
review.best_for: AWS shops that want autonomous RI/SP management without hiring FinOps
review.not_for: Multi-cloud orgs or teams preferring native AWS Savings Plans management
